---
title: "Photo Gallery"
author: ""
description: "Quarto Extension to easily set up gallery of photos"
date: "2026-06-28"
categories: [Quarto]
---

Here is a link to handy [Quarto extension](https://andrewheiss.github.io/quarto-static-photo-gallery/) to easily incorporate photo galleries into your site using Quarto.

Pretty easy install, I just forgot to install into my specific directory.
